item.title: Shin Kamen Rider: who wouldn’t want to watch an action flick about a grasshopper-man hybrid?
item.summary: Based on a 70s series, this film by Neon Genesis Evangelion creator Hideaki Anno is a thrilling lesson in standing up to evil (and driving very fast) Writer and director Hideaki Anno – the visionary behind cult anime hit Neon Genesis Evangelion – grew up watching tokusatsu : Japanese live-action films and TV shows that lean heavily on practical special effects. One of his idols was Kamen Rider, the protagonist of the 1971 series of the same name, a genetically augmented man-grasshopper, riding around and fighting evil on the back of a souped-up motorcycle. Continue reading...
